steps.description: Click inside the "Type a message..." input field located at the bottom of the Microsoft 365 Agents Playground interface to begin typing a message.
Type text into the input field at the bottom of the "Microsoft 365 Agents Playground" interface: 'What is Microsoft Teams App?'.
Press the "enter" key to submit the query typed into the text input field at the bottom of the "Microsoft 365 Agents Playground" application interface.
@assertion response content does not include response codes such as 400, 401, 404, 429. and not exist text 'error' or 'bug'
Click the "Close" button (X) at the top-right corner of the Google Chrome window to exit the Microsoft Teams web app.
